overview.minides: India's best-selling compact SUV and safest car — with 5-star Global NCAP and Bharat NCAP ratings, a turbocharged petrol CNG option unique in segment, panoramic sunroof, ventilated seats, and Level 2 ADAS on top trims.
overview.description: The Tata Nexon facelift (2023) is India's best-selling compact SUV with 5-star ratings from both Global NCAP and Bharat NCAP. It offers petrol, diesel, and the segment-unique turbocharged iCNG option across four trim lines — Smart, Pure, Creative, and Fearless. The 1.2-litre turbocharged petrol produces 120 PS and 170 Nm, available with a 5-speed manual (base), 6-speed manual, 6-speed AMT, or 7-speed dual-clutch (DCT) automatic. The diesel is a 1.5-litre producing 115 PS and 260 Nm. Top variants add a panoramic sunroof, JBL audio system, ventilated leatherette seats, wireless Android Auto and Apple CarPlay, 360-degree camera, and Level 2 ADAS with features including adaptive cruise control, lane keeping assist, and automatic emergency braking on the Fearless+ PS variant. Dark Editions add all-black exterior styling and ventilated leatherette seats.

iRA Connected Car with OTA, Remote AC, Live Tracking
